title: JJCSystems-Extension
description: Adds more Systems to the Original Jujutsucraft Mod
body:
## Overview

This mod adds small gameplay mechanics and utility features, including a point system, abilities, and a custom entity.

## Features

* No ocean generation
* Auto-random technique selector (toggleable via gamerule, true/false)
* Double jump buff (toggleable via gamerule, true/false)
* Kogane entity with:

  * Shop and points UI
  * Points gained from entity and player kills

## Kogane

Kogane spawns when:

* A curse is killed
* A player is killed

## Commands

* `/jjcpoints` – edit points in the Kogane UI
* `/kogane` – summon Kogane manually

## Notes

Most features can be enabled or disabled via gamerules.


⚠️ Required Dependency

This mod is an extension and requires the base mod:

➡️ Jujutsucraft (by Orcasan, ver49.1)

Make sure to install it, otherwise this mod will not work.

Note: The dependency could not be linked properly yet due to Modrinth review limitations.
